description: Providing and laying vacuum dewatered flooring M20 Grade of 100mm thickness  laid and vibrated with double beam screed vibrator till  achieving optimum  compaction and leveling. The vibrated surface is then leveled using a straight edge. A system of lower mats & top mat is laid on the green concrete & this is attached to a vacuum pump to draw  out surplus water if any. The concrete is left to stiffen. When the base concrete has stiffened to the point, Floor Hardener is applied at an even application rate of between 5-7 Kg/Sqmt. The concrete shall be  further compacted and leveled using Power Floater followed by finishing as per the requirement using Power Trowel (excludes ramp area). The rate to include curing, protecting the concrete floor etc., complete. Grooves (4mm X10mm) shall be provided for a bay size of 4m X 4m & grooves and filling the grooves with Sealent (Colpor - 200 from Fosroc chemicals or Poly sulphide sealant (Pedilite / BASF or equivalent).. For Parking Area

description: Providing and fixing at parking floor to floor expansion joint Kantaflex model no. – XH4FS-2 for 50mm in accordance with the Structural drawing and specifications. The system is proprietary design consisting of aluminum profiles. The expansion joint includes aluminum frames and centre plate which slides between the frames to allow the movement joints. The system shall withstand continuous pedestrian, vehicular traffic and maintain water tightness. The system should accommodate seismic movement without damage to the components. Aluminum to conform as per ASTM B221 for extrusion alloy 6063-T5/T6 and contain moisture barrier for maintaining water tightness. Cost to include drilling and fixing of extrusions using heavy duty anchor bolts, and sealing the joints capable of withstanding repeated extensions, compressions, vibrations and cyclic movement without lot of adhesion and resist deterioration by weathering, sunlight, ozone, water, salt water, oil, fuels, acids and most of the commonly used acids, etc., complete within 50% movement capacity.

description: Suppiy abd fixing of M19 Stud Bolts, These shear connectors are embossment in deck sheet as typical pattern unique to each profile. To ensure friction at the embossment , there should not be any paint or grease on the sheet surface in contact with concrete nor should any  vibrating load be permitted yo act on the  slab until the has set completely.  The length after weld should extend at least 35mm above  thetop of the main rib of the deck profile. The distance from the deck rib shall be minimum  25mm.  Single connector to be located at the center of the beam except at butt jionta where connector to be staggered. To avoide damaging to decking , connector to be located along the predetermined lines marked on it. Minimum spacing of cannectors shall be 5 times  the diameter of shank and maximum  shall not more than  600 or 4 times the depth of slab. Connectors in pair  to have a minimum gap  of 4 times the diameter of shank, as shown in drg & as directed  by consultant /EIC.

description:
Fire rated Intumescent/vermiculite paint( 2 Hrs Fire painting)
Supplying and applying light weight vermiculite gypsum/portland  cement based wet mix  spray to structural steel elements to get fire protected  up to 120 minutes , by certified applicator. Applied thickness to suit structural steel size and relevant Hp/A calculation. Subrate must be clean , dry and free from dust, or any other condition preventing good adhesion. Subrate shall be treated with adhesive key coat / primer  prior to spray application as required. The vermiculate spray material  used shall  pass all the the necessary testing criteria required foe fire rating as per the IBC/NBC/BS/AS/DIN/ASTM/  etc and shall be applied with necessary priming of the surface to get the attractive, monolithic, trovelled finish which  is durable and economical. The treated surface shall be with amonolithic spary with hydraulic set and trovelled finish  with no cracks or delamination's, no erosion,  no spalling etc and des not promote corrosion of steel . Rate to include  for scaffolding & all as directed by  consultant/EIC.
